seoTitle: St Helens vs St Kilda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Helens and St Kilda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Helens vs St Kilda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Helens and St Kilda.
heading: St Helens vs St Kilda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Helens, Queensland and St Kilda, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Helens has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to St Kilda (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Helens or St Kilda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Helens has a flood risk score of 35/100, while St Kilda scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Helens scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. St Kilda scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Helens or St Kilda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Helens has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
